items.example: That was one of the most memorable days of my life.
The week before the wedding was a complete nightmare.
The most embarrassing thing happened to me yesterday.
I was absolutely delighted when I heard the news.
I was shocked when I saw the damage to the car.
I was terrified when the dog started barking at me.

items.translation: внезапно, как гром среди ясного неба
items.example: My brother phoned me out of the blue.
I always wanted a fairy-tale wedding.
The ring has been passed down through generations.
My colleagues organised a surprise party for me.
